span.style: background:#fff3cd; color:#856404; border:1px solid #ffe082; font-size:12px; padding:5px 10px;

div.small: These changes are awaiting HR approval and will appear in your certifications once approved. You can view attached documents above.

a.style: color:#1a73e8; font-size:13px; text-decoration:none; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;

tr.td:
No approved certifications yet.
Click Add Certificate above to submit one for approval.

div.label: Employee Disclaimer – I hereby confirm that the information updated by me is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge. I agree to keep my data updated at all times and consent to the collection and use of such information for employment administration and legal compliances. I acknowledge that any false or incomplete information may lead to actions in accordance with company policies and applicable laws.

div.span: Choose a file to add or replace existing.
